ai_summary: AKI India Limited has undertaken a significant board restructuring, appointing four new directors (three independent and one non-independent) and reconstituting its key Audit and Nomination & Remuneration Committees with these new independent members, following the resignation of an existing independent director. While this brings fresh expertise and committee oversight, the appointment of a non-independent director who is the sister of the Managing Director and another non-executive director presents a potential red flag regarding board independence and corporate governance.
